name: Abstract: The Art of Design
overview: A documentary series profiling leading designers, including an episode on architect Bjarke Ingels.

name: Grand Designs
overview: Long-running British documentary series following ambitious self-build homes, many with strong modernist influences.

name: 10 Buildings That Changed America
overview: PBS special hosted by Geoffrey Baer surveying ten buildings that reshaped American architecture, from Fallingwater to the Seagram Building.

name: 10 Homes That Changed America
overview: PBS special hosted by Geoffrey Baer tracing ten residential designs that redefined American domestic architecture.

name: Grand Designs Australia
overview: Australian spin-off of Grand Designs, hosted by Peter Maddison, following owner-architect self-build projects across the country.

name: The World's Most Extraordinary Homes
overview: Piers Taylor and Caroline Quentin tour architecturally ambitious homes around the world, unpacking the design decisions behind each.

name: Restoration Home
overview: BBC series following owners restoring derelict historic British houses back to their original architectural character.

name: The Brits Who Built the Modern World
overview: BBC documentary series on the generation of British modernist architects, including Norman Foster, Richard Rogers, and Nicholas Grimshaw.

name: Home
overview: Apple TV+ documentary series profiling architecturally daring homes around the world and the people who built them.
